{"steps": [{"type": "selectOne", "var": "seg", "sql": "SELECT segment_id FROM emc_process_segment WHERE segment_id = ?", "params": ["${input.segmentId}"]}, {"type": "failIfNull", "var": "seg", "error_code": "SEGMENT_NOT_FOUND", "error_message": "Process segment not found"}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "UPDATE emc_work_master SET segment_id = ?, duration_min = NULLIF(?, ''), description = ? WHERE work_master_id = ? AND version = ?", "params": ["${input.segmentId}", "${input.durationMin}", "${input.description}", "${input.workMasterId}", "${input.version}"]}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO emc_work_master (work_master_id, version, segment_id, duration_min, description) SELECT ?, ?, ?, NULLIF(?, ''), ? WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM emc_work_master WHERE work_master_id = ? AND version = ?)", "params": ["${input.workMasterId}", "${input.version}", "${input.segmentId}", "${input.durationMin}", "${input.description}", "${input.workMasterId}", "${input.version}"]}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "workMasterId": "${input.workMasterId}", "version": "${input.version}"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "selectMany", "var": "masters", "sql": "SELECT wm.work_master_id, wm.version, wm.segment_id, s.name AS segment_name, wm.duration_min, COALESCE(wm.description, '') AS description FROM emc_work_master wm LEFT JOIN emc_process_segment s ON s.segment_id = wm.segment_id ORDER BY wm.work_master_id, wm.version"}, {"type": "map", "var": "rows", "source": "${masters}", "fields": {"workMasterId": "${item.work_master_id}", "version": "${item.version}", "segmentId": "${item.segment_id}", "segmentName": "${item.segment_name}", "durationMin": "${item.duration_min}", "description": "${item.description}"}}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "rows": "${rows}"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "selectMany", "var": "equipment", "sql": "SELECT equipment_id, COALESCE(class_id, '') AS class_id, equipment_level, COALESCE(parent_id, '') AS parent_id, COALESCE(hierarchy_path, '') AS hierarchy_path, COALESCE(description, '') AS description FROM emc_equipment WHERE (? = '' OR equipment_level = ?) ORDER BY hierarchy_path", "params": ["${input.equipmentLevel}", "${input.equipmentLevel}"]}, {"type": "map", "var": "rows", "source": "${equipment}", "fields": {"equipmentId": "${item.equipment_id}", "classId": "${item.class_id}", "equipmentLevel": "${item.equipment_level}", "parentId": "${item.parent_id}", "hierarchyPath": "${item.hierarchy_path}", "description": "${item.description}"}}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "rows": "${rows}"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "selectMany", "var": "persons", "sql": "SELECT p.person_id, p.person_name, COALESCE(p.personnel_class_id, '') AS personnel_class_id, COALESCE(c.description, '') AS class_description FROM emc_person p LEFT JOIN emc_personnel_class c ON c.class_id = p.personnel_class_id ORDER BY p.person_id"}, {"type": "map", "var": "rows", "source": "${persons}", "fields": {"personId": "${item.person_id}", "personName": "${item.person_name}", "personnelClassId": "${item.personnel_class_id}", "classDescription": "${item.class_description}"}}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "rows": "${rows}"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "failIfNull", "var": "input.externalRef", "error_code": "VALIDATION", "error_message": "externalRef is required"}, {"type": "failIfNull", "var": "input.requestId", "error_code": "VALIDATION", "error_message": "requestId is required"}, {"type": "failIfNull", "var": "input.jobNo", "error_code": "VALIDATION", "error_message": "jobNo is required"}, {"type": "failIfNull", "var": "input.workMasterId", "error_code": "VALIDATION", "error_message": "workMasterId is required"}, {"type": "failIfNull", "var": "input.equipmentId", "error_code": "VALIDATION", "error_message": "equipmentId is required"}, {"type": "selectOne", "var": "wm", "sql": "SELECT work_master_id, version, segment_id FROM emc_work_master WHERE work_master_id = ? "error_code": "EQUIPMENT_NOT_FOUND", "error_message": "Equipment not found"}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO emc_work_schedule (schedule_id, external_ref, schedule_state) SELECT ?, ?, 'RELEASED' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM emc_work_schedule WHERE schedule_id = ?)", "params": ["${input.externalRef}", "${input.externalRef}", "${input.externalRef}"]}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO emc_work_request (request_id, schedule_id, request_state, priority, product_definition_id, quantity, uom, start_time, end_time) SELECT ?, ?, 'ACCEPTED', COALESCE(NULLIF(?, ''), '5'), ?, COALESCE(NULLIF(?, ''), '0'), ?, NULLIF(?, ''), NULLIF(?, '') WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM emc_work_request WHERE request_id = ?)", "params": ["${input.requestId}", "${input.externalRef}", "${input.priority}", "${input.productDefinitionId}", "${input.quantity}", "${input.uom}", "${input.plannedStart}", "${input.plannedEnd}", "${input.requestId}"]}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO emc_job_order (job_order_id, job_no, request_id, work_master_id, work_master_version, segment_id, equipment_id, dispatch_status, command, priority, planned_start, planned_end) SELECT RANDOM_UUID(), ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'NOT_ALLOWED', 'STORE', COALESCE(NULLIF(?, ''), '5'), NULLIF(?, ''), NULLIF(?, '') WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM emc_job_order WHERE job_no = ?)", "params": ["${input.jobNo}", "${input.requestId}", "${input.workMasterId}", "${input.workMasterVersion}", "${wm.segment_id}", "${input.equipmentId}", "${input.priority}", "${input.plannedStart}", "${input.plannedEnd}", "${input.jobNo}"]}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO emc_job_order_material_req (job_no, definition_id, material_class_id, material_use, quantity, uom) SELECT ?, definition_id, material_class_id, AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM emc_job_order_material_req WHERE job_no = ?)", "params": ["${input.jobNo}", "${wm.segment_id}", "${input.jobNo}"]}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO emc_job_order_equipment_req (job_no, equipment_class_id, equipment_id, equipment_use, quantity) SELECT ?, equipment_class_id, equipment_id, equipment_use, quantity FROM emc_segment_equipment_spec WHERE segment_id = ? AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM emc_job_order_equipment_req WHERE job_no = ?)", "params": ["${input.jobNo}", "${wm.segment_id}", "${input.jobNo}"]}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO emc_job_order_personnel_req (job_no, personnel_class_id, person_id, personnel_use, quantity) SELECT ?, personnel_class_id, person_id, personnel_use, quantity FROM emc_segment_personnel_spec WHERE segment_id = ? AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM emc_job_order_personnel_req WHERE job_no = ?)", "params": ["${input.jobNo}", "${wm.segment_id}", "${input.jobNo}"]}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO emc_job_order_audit (id, job_no, action, detail, actor) VALUES (RANDOM_UUID(), ?, 'RECEIVED', ?, 'erp')", "params": ["${input.jobNo}", "${input.externalRef}"]}, {"type": "selectOne", "var": "job", "sql": "SELECT job_no, dispatch_status FROM emc_job_order WHERE job_no = ?", "params": ["${input.jobNo}"]}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "scheduleId": "${input.externalRef}", "requestId": "${input.requestId}", "jobNo": "${job.job_no}", "dispatchStatus": "${job.dispatch_status}"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "selectMany", "var": "schedules", "sql": "SELECT s.schedule_id, COALESCE(s.external_ref, '') AS external_ref, s.schedule_state, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM emc_work_request r WHERE r.schedule_id = s.schedule_id) AS requests, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM emc_job_order j JOIN emc_work_request r2 ON r2.request_id = j.request_id  WHERE r2.schedule_id = s.schedule_id) AS job_orders FROM emc_work_schedule s ORDER BY s.created_at DESC"}, {"type": "map", "var": "rows", "source": "${schedules}", "fields": {"scheduleId": "${item.schedule_id}", "externalRef": "${item.external_ref}", "scheduleState": "${item.schedule_state}", "requests": "${item.requests}", "jobOrders": "${item.job_orders}"}}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "rows": "${rows}"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "selectMany", "var": "jobs", "sql": "SELECT jo.job_no, jo.dispatch_status, jo.priority, jo.equipment_id, COALESCE(jo.segment_id, '') AS segment_id, COALESCE(wr.product_definition_id, '') AS product_definition_id, wr.quantity, COALESCE(wr.uom, '') AS uom, jo.planned_start FROM emc_job_order jo JOIN emc_work_request wr ON wr.request_id = jo.request_id WHERE (? = '' OR jo.equipment_id = ?) AND jo.dispatch_status NOT IN ('ENDED', 'ABORTED', 'CANCELLED') ORDER BY jo.priority, jo.planned_start", "params": ["${input.equipmentId}", "${input.equipmentId}"]}, {"type": "map", "var": "rows", "source": "${jobs}", "fields": {"jobNo": "${item.job_no}", "dispatchStatus": "${item.dispatch_status}", "priority": "${item.priority}", "equipmentId": "${item.equipment_id}", "segmentId": "${item.segment_id}", "productDefinitionId": "${item.product_definition_id}", "quantity": "${item.quantity}", "uom": "${item.uom}", "plannedStart": "${item.planned_start}"}}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "rows": "${rows}"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "selectOne", "var": "job", "sql": "SELECT job_no, dispatch_status FROM emc_job_order WHERE job_no = ?", "params": ["${input.jobNo}"]}, {"type": "failIfNull", "var": "job", "error_code": "JOB_NOT_FOUND", "error_message": "Job order not found"}, {"type": "failIfNotEquals", "var": "job.dispatch_status", "equals": "NOT_ALLOWED", "error_code": "INVALID_STATE", "error_message": "Only NOT_ALLOWED job orders can be released"}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "UPDATE emc_job_order SET dispatch_status = 'ALLOWED', command = 'STORE' WHERE job_no = ?", "params": ["${input.jobNo}"]}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO emc_job_order_audit (id, job_no, action, actor) VALUES (RANDOM_UUID(), ?, 'RELEASED', 'dispatcher')", "params": ["${input.jobNo}"]}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "jobNo": "${input.jobNo}", "dispatchStatus": "ALLOWED"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "selectOne", "var": "job", "sql": "SELECT job_no, dispatch_status, equipment_id, segment_id FROM emc_job_order WHERE job_no = ?", "params": ["${input.jobNo}"]}, {"type": "failIfNull", "var": "job", "error_code": "JOB_NOT_FOUND", "error_message": "Job order not found"}, {"type": "failIfNotEquals", "var": "job.dispatch_status", "equals": "ALLOWED", "error_code": "INVALID_STATE", "error_message": "Job order must be ALLOWED to start"}, {"type": "selectOne", "var": "conflict", "sql": "SELECT job_no FROM emc_job_order WHERE equipment_id = ? AND job_state = 'RUNNING')", "params": ["${input.jobNo}", "${input.jobNo}"]}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "UPDATE emc_job_order SET dispatch_status = 'RUNNING', command = 'START', actual_start = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE job_no = ?", "params": ["${input.jobNo}"]}, {"type": "selectOne", "var": "resp", "sql": "SELECT response_id FROM emc_job_response WHERE job_no = ? AND job_state = 'RUNNING'", "params": ["${input.jobNo}"]}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO emc_job_response_data (id, response_id, data_kind, started_at) SELECT RANDOM_UUID(), ?, 'RUN_INTERVAL', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM emc_job_response_data d WHERE d.response_id = ? AND person_id = ?)", "params": ["${resp.response_id}", "${input.personId}", "${resp.response_id}", "${input.personId}"]}], "var": "input.personId", "notNull": true}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO emc_erp_outbox (id, verb, noun, object_id, payload_json, idempotency_key, status) SELECT RANDOM_UUID(), 'PROCESS', 'OPERATIONS_EVENT', ?, CONCAT('{\"event\":\"work commenced\",\"jobNo\":\"', ?, '\"}'), CONCAT('WO-COMMENCED:', ?), 'PENDING' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM emc_erp_outbox WHERE idempotency_key = CONCAT('WO-COMMENCED:', ?))", "params": ["${input.jobNo}", "${input.jobNo}", "${input.jobNo}", "${input.jobNo}"]}, {"type": "when", "then": [{"type": "writeVariable", "objectPath": "root.platform.devices.emc-wu-a01", "variable": "status", "fields": {"value": "RUNNING"}}, {"type": "writeVariable", "objectPath": "root.platform.devices.emc-wu-a01", "variable": "activeJobOrderId", "fields": {"value": "${job.job_no}"}}], "var": "job.equipment_id", "equals": "WU-A01"}, {"type": "when", "then": [{"type": "writeVariable", "objectPath": "root.platform.devices.emc-wu-a02", "variable": "status", "fields": {"value": "RUNNING"}}, {"type": "writeVariable", "objectPath": "root.platform.devices.emc-wu-a02", "variable": "activeJobOrderId", "fields": {"value": "${job.job_no}"}}], "var": "job.equipment_id", "equals": "WU-A02"}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO emc_job_order_audit (id, job_no, action, actor) VALUES (RANDOM_UUID(), ?, 'STARTED', 'operator')", "params": ["${input.jobNo}"]}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "jobNo": "${job.job_no}", "status": "RUNNING", "responseId": "${resp.response_id}"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "when", "then": [{"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "CONNECTOR_NOT_CONFIGURED", "error_message": "No ERP connector configured (set simulate=true for the built-in simulator)", "transported": "0"}}], "var": "input.simulate", "equals": "false"}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "UPDATE emc_erp_outbox SET status = 'IN_FLIGHT' WHERE status = 'PENDING'"}, {"type": "selectOne", "var": "cnt", "sql": "SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM emc_erp_outbox WHERE status = 'IN_FLIGHT'"}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO emc_integration_log (id, direction, verb, noun, success, code, message) SELECT RANDOM_UUID(), 'OUT', verb, noun, true, 'OK', 'Simulated transport, ACK ACCEPTED' FROM emc_erp_outbox WHERE status = 'IN_FLIGHT'"}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "UPDATE emc_erp_outbox SET status = 'ACKED', ack_code = 'ACCEPTED' WHERE status = 'IN_FLIGHT'"}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "transported": "${cnt.cnt}"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "failIfNull", "var": "input.idempotencyKey", "error_code": "VALIDATION", "error_message": "idempotencyKey is required"}, {"type": "selectOne", "var": "dup", "sql": "SELECT id FROM emc_erp_inbox WHERE idempotency_key = ?", "params": ["${input.idempotencyKey}"]}, {"type": "when", "then": [{"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "DUPLICATE", "error_message": "Message with this idempotency key already received", "idempotencyKey": "${input.idempotencyKey}", "status": "DUPLICATE"}}], "var": "dup", "notNull": true}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO emc_erp_inbox (id, verb, noun, payload_json, idempotency_key, status) VALUES (RANDOM_UUID(), ?, ?, ?, ?, 'RECEIVED')", "params": ["${input.verb}", "${input.noun}", "${input.payloadJson}", "${input.idempotencyKey}"]}, {"type": "when", "then": [{"type": "jsonParse", "var": "p", "source": "${input.payloadJson}", "fields": ["externalRef", "requestId", "jobNo", "workMasterId", "workMasterVersion", "equipmentId", "productDefinitionId", "quantity", "uom", "priority", "plannedStart", "plannedEnd"]}, {"type": "invoke_function", "objectPath": "root.platform.singleton-blueprints.erp-mes-core-hub-v1", "functionName": "emc_schedule_receive", "var": "sched", "input": {"externalRef": "${p.externalRef}", "requestId": "${p.requestId}", "jobNo": "${p.jobNo}", "workMasterId": "${p.workMasterId}", "workMasterVersion": "${p.workMasterVersion}", "equipmentId": "${p.equipmentId}", "productDefinitionId": "${p.productDefinitionId}", "quantity": "${p.quantity}", "uom": "${p.uom}", "priority": "${p.priority}", "plannedStart": "${p.plannedStart}", "plannedEnd": "${p.plannedEnd}"}}], "var": "input.noun", "equals": "OPERATIONS_SCHEDULE"}, {"type": "when", "then": [{"type": "jsonParse", "var": "m", "source": "${input.payloadJson}", "fields": ["entityType", "externalId"]}, {"type": "invoke_function", "objectPath": "root.platform.singleton-blueprints.erp-mes-core-hub-v1", "functionName": "emc_erp_syncMasterData", "var": "md", "input": {"entityType": "${m.entityType}", "externalId": "${m.externalId}", "payloadJson": "${input.payloadJson}"}}], "var": "input.noun", "equals": "MASTER_DATA"}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "UPDATE emc_erp_inbox SET status = 'PROCESSED', processed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE idempotency_key = ?", "params": ["${input.idempotencyKey}"]}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "idempotencyKey": "${input.idempotencyKey}", "status": "PROCESSED"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "failIfNull", "var": "input.entityType", "error_code": "VALIDATION", "error_message": "entityType is required"}, {"type": "failIfNull", "var": "input.externalId", "error_code": "VALIDATION", "error_message": "externalId is required"}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "UPDATE emc_master_data_replica SET payload_json = ?, synced_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE entity_type = ? AND external_id = ?", "params": ["${input.payloadJson}", "${input.entityType}", "${input.externalId}"]}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO emc_master_data_replica (entity_type, external_id, payload_json) SELECT ?, ?, ? WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM emc_master_data_replica WHERE entity_type = ? AND external_id = ?)", "params": ["${input.entityType}", "${input.externalId}", "${input.payloadJson}", "${input.entityType}", "${input.externalId}"]}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "entityType": "${input.entityType}", "externalId": "${input.externalId}"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "selectMany", "var": "msgs", "sql": "SELECT verb, noun, COALESCE(object_id, '') AS object_id, status, COALESCE(ack_code, '') AS ack_code, idempotency_key, created_at FROM emc_erp_outbox ORDER BY created_at DESC"}, {"type": "map", "var": "rows", "source": "${msgs}", "fields": {"verb": "${item.verb}", "noun": "${item.noun}", "objectId": "${item.object_id}", "status": "${item.status}", "ackCode": "${item.ack_code}", "idempotencyKey": "${item.idempotency_key}", "createdAt": "${item.created_at}"}}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "rows": "${rows}"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "failIfNull", "var": "input.equipmentId", "error_code": "VALIDATION", "error_message": "equipmentId is required"}, {"type": "failIfNull", "var": "input.shiftLabel", "error_code": "VALIDATION", "error_message": "shiftLabel is required"}, {"type": "selectOne", "var": "av", "sql": "SELECT COALESCE(SUM(e.time_min), 0) AS v FROM emc_operations_event e JOIN emc_operations_event_definition d ON d.code = e.definition_code WHERE d.oee_bucket = 'AVAILABILITY' AND e.equipment_id = ?", "params": ["${input.equipmentId}"]}, {"type": "selectOne", "var": "pf", "sql": "SELECT COALESCE(SUM(e.time_min), 0) AS v FROM emc_operations_event e JOIN emc_operations_event_definition d ON d.code = e.definition_code WHERE d.oee_bucket = 'PERFORMANCE' AND e.equipment_id = ?", "params": ["${input.equipmentId}"]}, {"type": "selectOne", "var": "pr", "sql": "SELECT COALESCE(SUM(a.quantity), 0) AS v FROM emc_material_actual a JOIN emc_job_response r ON r.response_id = a.response_id JOIN emc_job_order o ON o.job_no = r.job_no WHERE a.material_use = 'PRODUCED' AND o.equipment_id = ?", "params": ["${input.equipmentId}"]}, {"type": "selectOne", "var": "df", "sql": "SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(d.qty_confirmed, d.qty_declared)), 0) AS v FROM emc_defect_record d JOIN emc_job_order o ON o.job_no = d.job_no WHERE d.status IN ('CONFIRMED', 'CLOSED') AND o.equipment_id = ?", "params": ["${input.equipmentId}"]}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "DELETE FROM emc_oee_shift WHERE equipment_id = ? AND shift_label = ?", "params": ["${input.equipmentId}", "${input.shiftLabel}"]}, {"type": "exec", "sql": "INSERT INTO emc_oee_shift (id, equipment_id, shift_label, planned_min, availability_loss_min, performance_loss_min, produced_qty, good_qty, availability_pct, performance_pct, quality_pct, oee_pct) SELECT RANDOM_UUID(), ?, ?, p.planned, p.av, p.pf, p.pr, p.good, p.a_pct, p.p_pct, p.q_pct, ROUND(p.a_pct * p.p_pct * p.q_pct / 10000, 2) FROM (SELECT b.planned, b.av, b.pf, b.pr, GREATEST(b.pr - b.df, 0) AS good, CASE WHEN b.planned > 0 THEN ROUND(100 * (b.planned - b.av) / b.planned, 2) ELSE 0 END AS a_pct, CASE WHEN b.planned - b.av > 0 THEN ROUND(100 * GREATEST(b.planned - b.av - b.pf, 0) / (b.planned - b.av), 2) ELSE 0 END AS p_pct, CASE WHEN b.pr > 0 THEN ROUND(100 * GREATEST(b.pr - b.df, 0) / b.pr, 2) ELSE 0 END AS q_pct FROM (SELECT CAST(COALESCE(NULLIF(?, ''), '480') AS NUMERIC) AS planned, CAST(? AS NUMERIC) AS av, CAST(? AS NUMERIC) AS pf, CAST(? AS NUMERIC) AS pr, CAST(? AS NUMERIC) AS df) b) p", "params": ["${input.equipmentId}", "${input.shiftLabel}", "${input.plannedMinutes}", "${av.v}", "${pf.v}", "${pr.v}", "${df.v}"]}, {"type": "selectOne", "var": "kpi", "sql": "SELECT availability_pct, performance_pct, quality_pct, oee_pct FROM emc_oee_shift WHERE equipment_id = ? AND shift_label = ?", "params": ["${input.equipmentId}", "${input.shiftLabel}"]}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "equipmentId": "${input.equipmentId}", "shiftLabel": "${input.shiftLabel}", "availabilityPct": "${kpi.availability_pct}", "performancePct": "${kpi.performance_pct}", "qualityPct": "${kpi.quality_pct}", "oeePct": "${kpi.oee_pct}"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "selectOne", "var": "kpi", "sql": "SELECT shift_label, availability_pct, performance_pct, quality_pct, oee_pct FROM emc_oee_shift WHERE equipment_id = ? ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1", "params": ["${input.equipmentId}"]}, {"type": "when", "then": [{"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "equipmentId": "${input.equipmentId}", "shiftLabel": "${kpi.shift_label}", "availabilityPct": "${kpi.availability_pct}", "performancePct": "${kpi.performance_pct}", "qualityPct": "${kpi.quality_pct}", "oeePct": "${kpi.oee_pct}"}}], "var": "kpi", "notNull": true, "else": [{"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "No OEE data calculated yet", "equipmentId": "${input.equipmentId}", "shiftLabel": "", "availabilityPct": "0", "performancePct": "0", "qualityPct": "0", "oeePct": "0"}}]}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "No OEE data calculated yet", "equipmentId": "${input.equipmentId}", "shiftLabel": "", "availabilityPct": "0", "performancePct": "0", "qualityPct": "0", "oeePct": "0"}}]}

{"steps": [{"type": "selectMany", "var": "shifts", "sql": "SELECT equipment_id, shift_label, planned_min, availability_loss_min, performance_loss_min, produced_qty, good_qty, availability_pct, performance_pct, quality_pct, oee_pct, calculated_at FROM emc_oee_shift WHERE (? = '' OR equipment_id = ?) ORDER BY calculated_at DESC", "params": ["${input.equipmentId}", "${input.equipmentId}"]}, {"type": "map", "var": "rows", "source": "${shifts}", "fields": {"equipmentId": "${item.equipment_id}", "shiftLabel": "${item.shift_label}", "plannedMin": "${item.planned_min}", "availabilityLossMin": "${item.availability_loss_min}", "performanceLossMin": "${item.performance_loss_min}", "producedQty": "${item.produced_qty}", "goodQty": "${item.good_qty}", "availabilityPct": "${item.availability_pct}", "performancePct": "${item.performance_pct}", "qualityPct": "${item.quality_pct}", "oeePct": "${item.oee_pct}", "calculatedAt": "${item.calculated_at}"}}, {"type": "return", "fields": {"error_code": "OK", "error_message": "", "rows": "${rows}"}}]}

workflows.title: Job Dispatch Confirmation
workflows.bpmnXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<bpmn:definitions xmlns:bpmn="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL"
                  xmlns:isfp="http://ispf.io/bpmn"
                  id="emc-job-dispatch-defs" targetNamespace="http://ispf.io/erp-mes-core">
  <bpmn:process id="emc-job-dispatch" isExecutable="true">
    <bpmn:startEvent id="start" name="Job dispatched"/>
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="log" name="Log dispatch" isfp:action="log"
                      isfp:message="Job order dispatched for execution"/>
    <bpmn:userTask id="confirm" name="Confirm job start" isfp:title="Confirm job start"
                   isfp:instructions="Verify line clearance and materials, then confirm start."
                   isfp:assigneeRole="operator"
                   isfp:targetObject="root.platform.singleton-blueprints.erp-mes-core-hub-v1"
                   isfp:function="emc_joborder_confirmStart"/>
    <bpmn:endEvent id="end" name="Done"/>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="f1" sourceRef="start" targetRef="log"/>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="f2" sourceRef="log" targetRef="confirm"/>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="f3" sourceRef="confirm" targetRef="end"/>
  </bpmn:process>
</bpmn:definitions>

SELECT o.job_order_id AS id, o.job_no, COALESCE(s.external_ref, '') AS external_ref,
       COALESCE(o.command, '') AS command, o.dispatch_status, o.equipment_id,
       COALESCE(r.product_definition_id, '') AS product_definition_id, r.quantity, COALESCE(r.uom, '') AS uom,
       o.planned_start, o.planned_end, o.created_at
FROM emc_job_order o
JOIN emc_work_request r ON r.request_id = o.request_id
JOIN emc_work_schedule s ON s.schedule_id = r.schedule_id
WHERE o.dispatch_status NOT IN ('ENDED', 'ABORTED', 'CANCELLED')
ORDER BY o.planned_start ASC, o.job_no

reports.title: Inventory Stock (Material Lots)
reports.description: Material lots with quantity, status and location (Part 2 material lot).
reports.query:
SELECT l.lot_id, l.barcode, l.definition_id AS material_id, COALESCE(d.class_id, '') AS class_id,
       l.quantity, l.base_uom AS uom, l.status, COALESCE(l.storage_location, '') AS storage_location
FROM emc_material_lot l JOIN emc_material_definition d ON d.definition_id = l.definition_id
ORDER BY l.lot_id

reports.title: Material Movement (Material Actual)
reports.description: Consumed / produced / moved / scrapped material actuals per job order (Part 4).
reports.query:
SELECT a.recorded_at, r.job_no, a.material_use, COALESCE(a.lot_id, '') AS lot_id,
       COALESCE(a.definition_id, '') AS material_id, a.quantity, COALESCE(a.uom, '') AS uom
FROM emc_material_actual a
JOIN emc_job_response r ON r.response_id = a.response_id
ORDER BY a.recorded_at DESC

reports.title: Quality Defects
reports.description: Defect log with QA workflow status (Part 3 quality operations).
reports.query:
SELECT defect_no, job_no, defect_type_id, qty_declared, severity, status,
       COALESCE(reason_code, '') AS reason_code, COALESCE(created_by, '') AS created_by, created_at
FROM emc_defect_record
ORDER BY created_at DESC

reports.title: OEE by Shift (ISO 22400 subset)
reports.description: Availability / Performance / Quality / OEE per equipment per shift.
reports.query:
SELECT equipment_id, shift_label, planned_min, availability_loss_min, performance_loss_min,
       produced_qty, good_qty, availability_pct, performance_pct, quality_pct, oee_pct, calculated_at
FROM emc_oee_shift
ORDER BY calculated_at DESC
